title: Expanding Stargate to Michigan
titleZh: 将星际之门扩展到密歇根州
summary: OpenAI is expanding Stargate to Michigan with a new one-gigawatt campus that strengthens America’s AI infrastructure. The project will create jobs, drive investment, and support economic growth across the Midwest.
summaryZh: OpenAI正在将星际之门扩展到密歇根州，建立一个新的1吉瓦校园，加强美国的人工智能基础设施。该项目将创造就业机会，推动投资，并支持整个中西部的经济增长。
highlights: OpenAI is expanding Stargate to Michigan with a new one-gigawatt campus that strengthens America’s AI infrastructure.
The project will create jobs, drive investment, and support economic growth across the Midwest.
highlightsZh: OpenAI正在将星际之门扩展到密歇根州，建立一个新的1吉瓦校园，加强美国的人工智能基础设施。该项目将创造就业机会，推动投资，并支持整个中西部的经济增长。

title: Introducing Aardvark: OpenAI’s agentic security researcher

summary: OpenAI introduces Aardvark, an AI-powered security researcher that autonomously finds, validates, and helps fix software vulnerabilities at scale. The system is in private beta—sign up to join early testing.
summaryZh: OpenAI推出了Aardvark ，这是一个人工智能驱动的安全研究人员，可以自动发现、验证并帮助大规模修复软件漏洞。该系统正在进行私有测试版注册，以加入早期测试。
highlights: OpenAI introduces Aardvark, an AI-powered security researcher that autonomously finds, validates, and helps fix software vulnerabilities at scale.
The system is in private beta—sign up to join early testing.

title: Doppel’s AI defense system stops attacks before they spread
